recommendations.description: Merge 17 duplicate rules checking same fields (many check DetectorIds existence instead of actual configuration)
Fix 16 rules checking wrong fields (check DetectorIds existence instead of actual configuration)
recommendations.impact: HIGH - Ensures rules validate correct compliance requirements

cross_service_analysis.note: Note: All methods used are guardduty service methods
cross_service_analysis.explanation: All python_methods (list_detectors, describe_organization_configuration) belong to guardduty service. No cross-service issues found.
cross_service_analysis.recommendation: No action needed - rules correctly use guardduty API methods

issues_fixed: Fixed metadata_mapping.json for security_center_enabled (changed from list_detectors/DetectorIds to get_detector/Status)
Fixed metadata_mapping.json for guardduty_vulnerability_assessment_enabled (changed from list_detectors/DetectorIds to get_detector/DataSources.MalwareProtection...)
Fixed metadata_mapping.json for guardduty_detector_s_enabled (changed from list_detectors/DetectorIds to get_detector/Status)
Fixed metadata_mapping.json for eks_audit_log_enabled (fixed field path to include Features prefix)
Fixed metadata_mapping.json for finding_detector_finding_export_encrypted_destination (changed from list_detectors/DetectorIds to get_detector/DataSources.KinesisDataStream...)
Fixed metadata_mapping.json for alert_destinations_configured (changed from list_detectors/DetectorIds to get_detector with Status and FindingPublishingFrequency)
Fixed metadata_mapping.json for guardduty_source_trusted_configured (changed from list_detectors/DetectorIds to get_detector with multiple DataSources checks)
Fixed metadata_mapping.json for centrally_managed and guardduty_sources_trusted_configured (removed incorrect all logical operator)
Fixed boolean values to match YAML (changed True to string "true")

test_results.notes: Validation complete. All rules pass metadata mapping validation. AWS scan executes successfully (9 checks found in test account).
